folio.label: 205r
folio.l: And in amalgamyng , and calcenyngö
And of quyk siluer , I cleped Mäcurie crude
For alle oure sleigútes , we can nat conclude
Oure Orpement , and sublimed Mercurie
Oure grounden litarge eke , on the porfurie
And eche of theise , vnces a certeyne
Nat helpetú vs , oure labour is in veyne
Ne eke oure spirites , ascensiou~
Ne oure maters , æ lyn al fix a doun
Moun in oure werkynge , no thing vs a vaille
For loost is al oure labour , & trauaille
And al the cost , a twenty deuel weye
Is loost also , whicú we vp on it leye
There is also , ful many a nother thyngö
That is vn to oure craft , ap¹tenyngö
Thougú I be ordre , hem nat reherce can
By cause that I am , a lewed man
ñet wole I telle he~ , as they come to mynde
Thougú I ne can nat , sette he~ in here kynde
As Bole Armonyak , verdegres , Boras
And sundry vesselles , mad of erthe & glas
Oure vrinales , and oure descensories
Violes , crosletz , and sublimatories
Cucurbitz , and alambikes eke
And othere suche , dere I now a leke
Nat nedetú it , for to reherce he~ alle
Watres rubisyng , and Booles galle
Arsenyk , salarmonyak , and Brymstou~
And Erbes coude I telle eke , many oon
As Egremoyne, valerian , and lymarie
And othere swicú , if æ me list tarie
Oure laumpes brenne , bothe nygút & day
To brynge a boute oure purpos , if we may
Oure fourneys eke , of calcinaciou~
And of watres , albificaciou~
Vnslekked lym , Chalk , and gleir of an ey
Poudres diuäse , asshes , donge , pisse , & cley
Sered pottes , salpetir , vitriole
And diuäse fyres made , of wode & cole
Sal tartre , Alkaly , and salt päparat
And combust matiers , and coagulat
Cley , mad w hors & ma~nes her , & oyle
Of Tartre , Alumglas , Berm , Wort , and Argule
